subject: Social Science (Political Science)
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the meaning and importance of political parties in a democracy
Identify the main components of political parties
Explain the major functions performed by political parties
Understand different types of party systems
Learn about national and state parties in India
Identify the challenges faced by political parties
Discuss reforms required to improve political parties

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Political Parties
topics_covered: Importance of political parties in democracy
Examples of political parties in India
student_activities: Students list political parties they know
Group discussion on why political parties exist

lesson_plan.title: Components of Political Parties
student_activities: Create a diagram showing party components
Discuss roles of leaders and members

lesson_plan.title: Functions of Political Parties
student_activities: Identify functions of political parties from examples
Write short notes on each function

lesson_plan.title: Different Party Systems
student_activities: Create a comparison chart of party systems

lesson_plan.title: National and State Parties in India
topics_covered: Examples of major parties in India
teaching_strategy: Examples of national and regional parties
student_activities: Research a political party and present facts

lesson_plan.title: Challenges to Political Parties
topics_covered: Role of money and muscle power
student_activities: Students identify examples of these challenges

lesson_plan.title: Reforms and Chapter Revision
student_activities: Participate in quiz or revision game

teacher_tip: Use examples from current elections or news to help students connect political party concepts with real-life democratic processes.
